module.name: native
module.purpose: Namespace for built-in native tool programs. File and shell child modules now import tool preview/schema protocol contracts from marix-protocol through their concrete tool implementations.

childModules.name: file
childModules.purpose: Filesystem native tool programs: ReadFile, WriteFile, ListDirectory, and SearchText, each wrapping preview schema constants in ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema content and implementing invoke() with std::fs work.

childModules.name: shell
childModules.purpose: Native shell command execution tool program: ShellExecute, wrapping preview schema constants in ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema content and running commands through std::process::Command.
